# pexip_infinity_media_library_entry (Resource)

Manages a media library entry configuration with the Infinity service. Media library entries are used for storing media files such as images, videos, and audio files that can be used in conferences.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pexip_infinity_media_library_entry" "example" {
  name       = "Welcome Message"
  media_file = "/path/to/welcome.mp4"
}
```


<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `media_file` (String) Path to the media file to upload (e.g., `media_file = "path/to/video.mp4"`).
- `name` (String) The name used to refer to this Media Library Item. Maximum length: 1024 characters.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description of this Media Library Item. Maximum length: 1024 characters.

### Read-Only

- `file_name` (String) The file name of the uploaded media file.
- `id` (String) Resource URI for the media library entry in Infinity
- `media_format` (String) The media format of the uploaded file (e.g., mp4, wav, jpg).
- `media_size` (Number) The size of the media file in bytes.
- `media_type` (String) The media type of the uploaded file (e.g., video, audio, image).
- `resource_id` (Number) The resource integer identifier for the media library entry in Infinity
- `uuid` (String) UUID for the media library entry (read-only, assigned by the API).
